title: Floral - Magnolia Room Spray | Purple Decorative Design | Instantly Revitalises the Air with a Fresh Floral Fragrance | 400mL Each
features: ELEGANT DESIGN: Beautiful purple container adorned with a decorative floral pattern featuring magnolias and mixed blooms for an aesthetically pleasing appearance
GENEROUS SIZE: Each room spray contains 400mL of fragrant solution, providing long-lasting freshness for your space
INSTANT FRESHNESS: Effectively revitalises the air with a delightful magnolia-based floral fragrance for immediate ambiance enhancement
VERSATILE USE: Perfect for bathrooms, living rooms, bedrooms, and any indoor space requiring a fresh, floral scent
CONVENIENT APPLICATION: Easy-to-use spray format allows for quick and precise fragrance distribution throughout your room
description: Transform your living space with the enchanting Floral Magnolia Room Spray. This elegantly designed 400ml spray bottle features a stunning purple exterior adorned with a delightful array of floral patterns, including soft blue blossoms, gentle pink petals, and deep burgundy blooms. The sophisticated fragrance combines the sweet, delicate notes of magnolia with complementary floral undertones to create an inviting atmosphere in any room. Perfect for refreshing your home, office, or any indoor space, this decorative room spray instantly revitalises the air with its refined floral scent. The beautiful bottle design serves as an attractive addition to your home décor whilst providing a practical solution for maintaining a fresh-smelling environment. The generous 400ml size ensures long-lasting use, making it an excellent choice for daily freshening. Simply spray as needed to infuse your space with the captivating aroma of magnolia blossoms.
